$comment: Pinned from execution-boundary-core-spec commit 47588ff. Do not modify — update by re-pinning from upstream.
title: Decision
description: Output of the Evaluator. Only ALLOW enables execution. Must be appended to ledger regardless of result.

action_id.description: Identifier of the ActionEnvelope this decision applies to.

result.description: Evaluation outcome. Only ALLOW permits execution. DENY closes the action. HOLD requires re-evaluation.

reason_code.description: Machine-readable code describing the reason for this decision.

authority_token.description: Token identifying the authority that produced this decision.

proof_hash.description: Hash over decision_id + action_id + result + timestamp. Provides verifiable record of denial or approval.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the decision was produced.
